name: HPV18_integration_hotspots
description: HPV18 integration is the dominant driver of cervical adenocarcinoma. Integration breakpoints concentrate in E1/E2 (nt ~1900-3800) and at MYC (chr8q24.21) — HeLa carries integrated HPV18 ~500 kb upstream of MYC, an event repeatedly observed in primary tumors. Host targets are enriched at common fragile sites and active enhancers; the HPV18 LCR retains its enhancer activity from the integrated site and trans-activates nearby host oncogenes including MYC.
expected_copy_count: 1 to ~50 integrated copies per adenocarcinoma cell
